economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Yellow Quill Holdings Inc., Yellow Quill Development Corporation, Yellow Quill Urban Services Inc., Yellow Quill Store (A Band Enterprise), and Yellow Quill Child & Family Prevention Services Inc. Yellow Quill Property Management LP is fully consolidated. YQ Holdings had net income of $549,540 for year ended Dec 31, 2022. YQ Store had net income of $176,631.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) accounts payable existence/completeness/accuracy could not be verified, (2) education department expenditures had insufficient supporting documentation, and (3) Yellow Quill Property Management LP (fully consolidated subsidiary) had insufficient supporting documentation. Financial statements are dated March 31, 2023 but management signature and auditors' report are dated June 25/27, 2025 respectively — a significant delay of over two years. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. One subsidiary (Yellow Quill Property Management LP) fully consolidated. Deferred revenue netting in revenue lines makes revenue presentation unusual — gross deferred revenue opening and closing netted through revenue. ISC funding dropped significantly from $21.9M in 2022 to $16.7M in 2023. restricted_cash includes $3,859,476 capital project cash plus $92,471 CMHC replacement reserve. current_liabilities includes accounts payable $913,222, due to related parties $97,221, current portion long-term debt $202,076, current portion CMHC mortgages $123,963. annual_debt_service includes long-term debt repayment $208,418 plus CMHC mortgage repayment $113,532 = $321,950. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $16,698,514 + CMHC $195,547 + Heritage Canada $227,848 + Trust funds federal $371,260 + Government of Saskatchewan $0 = $17,493,169; however STC and STC Health & Family Services may also be government transfers — if included: $17,493,169 + $768,368 + $2,061,738 = $20,323,275. Conservative estimate used excludes STC entities as quasi-government. osr calculated as total revenue $24,366,091 minus estimated government transfers.
